name: canshare-who-uterine-corpus-site-histology
title: NZ WHO uterine corpus site histology
description: Histologies used for uterine corpus sites, from WHO Classification of Tumours, Female Genital Tumours (latest edition) - Sections 7. Tumours of the uterine corpus, 12. Neuroendocrine neoplasia, 13. Haematolymphoid proliferations and neoplasia, 14. Mesenchymal tumours of the lower genital tract, 15. Melanocytic lesions or an 'Other' value.
